description: This video explains the differences between Centralized Finance (CeFi) and Decentralized Finance (DeFi), highlighting their respective advantages and limitations.
topic_summary: CeFi dominates crypto trading with over 90% volume on centralized exchanges [t=4:40]. DeFi eliminates middlemen, using smart contracts for trades [t=11:76]. CeFi offers convenience and customer support, while DeFi provides user control and privacy [t=33:79].
